basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has officially announced the Project Nurse Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Candidates up to 35 years of age who have completed a four year Nursing course are eligible to submit their applications through Email on or before 23 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Upper age relaxation for SC/ST up to 5 years and OBC up to 3 years.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Overview
AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 35 years Upper age relaxation for SC/ST up to 5 years and OBC up to 3 years.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse position is 23rd July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Nurse post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Four-year Nursing Course to be eligible for the Project Nurse position at AIIMS Delhi. This is the primary educational requirement.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Nurse position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Nurse post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Project Nurse role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Nurse position at AIIMS Delhi will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Nurse position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Nurse role will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 28,000 to Rs. 36,400 per month, which includes a basic pay and HRA component.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the Project Nurse position at AIIMS Delhi?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted via email. You should prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Nurse post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Nurse position announced by AIIMS Delhi in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Project Nurse position at AIIMS Delhi is a contractual role. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where is AIIMS Delhi located?
faq.answer: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110029. This is the city where the recruitment is being conducted.
